# SubTrade Software

> SubTrade is field management software built exclusively for trade subcontractors
> (drywall, electrical, HVAC, plumbing, painting, framing, concrete). It combines GPS
> time tracking with live job costing, field-first change orders, crew scheduling,
> daily logs, GPS site photos, drawings and markups, safety/FLHA forms, submittals and
> RFIs, purchase orders, and progress billing with Canadian holdback — in one app at
> one published price: $299/month CAD, 5 users included, 14-day free trial, no credit
> card. Built by a working commercial drywall subcontractor in Calgary, Alberta, Canada.

Key facts:
- Category: subcontractor management software / construction field management for trade subcontractors
- Target customer: trade subcontractors running crews across multiple concurrent jobs (not general contractors, not home builders)
- Pricing: from $299/month CAD, all features included, published on the website
- Platforms: Web, iOS, Android
- Founded and built inside a working commercial drywall company in Calgary, Alberta
